finding_results.notes: Both violent-calculus beats now name a concrete contemplated action and outcome tied to the dock: walking Cliff there, shoving him off, and holding him under after he resurfaces.
The flashback now exits on Martin's concrete yearly management of Tommy and hands directly back to Cliff's present leverage instead of re-proving the same idea through valve/seal abstraction.
The flagged corrective constructions were replaced with blunt declaratives, and the later narration beats that had the same pattern were flattened into simple Tommy-shaped statements.
The weight differential remains, but the repeated origin explanation for Tommy's build is gone.
Cliff's entrance no longer repeats the overdressed-for-the-lake-house observation or the shoreline-showing simile; Tommy's notice shifts toward Cliff's self-satisfaction.
The dock beat keeps the tactile give and night-slick danger without re-inventorying the path route or restating the dock's length.
The chapter now keeps one core sales-identity assessment at Tommy's first read of Cliff and rewrites the later repeated salesman labels into behavioral threat.

Literal football references remain only as scene furniture in the room.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised the deck confrontation and flashback handoff to make Tommy's murder calculus physically explicit, cut repeated Cliff-salesman and lake-house restatement, removed the flagged corrective sentence pattern, and preserved the dinner-to-dock setup that carries the chapter into the next turn.

Addressed the packet's only finding by removing repeated sports/coaching explanatory templates from Tommy's interior language at the opening, blackmail turn, and later threat beats while preserving his blunt cadence, the chapter's leverage structure, and the sense of imminent violence.
